meta.title: RADAR RACES — Accelerate your management radar
meta.description: A new-format management intensive: developing leadership skills of executives and top teams through motorsport experience and a management debrief session.

hero.title: Accelerate your
hero.subtitle: Unique management sessions blending the extreme experience of racing on a professional track with a deep analysis of leadership competencies.
hero.lead: 1–2–3 day intensives and strategic sessions for executives and top teams.

stats.label: hours of training for top teams per year

about.title: Learning through experience that changes thinking
paragraphs: RADAR RACES is an innovative approach to developing leadership skills. We combine the extreme experience of motorsport with a deep analysis of management competencies.
The Experiential Learning format lets participants step beyond the familiar, rethink their management style and gain new insights to become more effective as leaders.
The race track becomes a metaphor for business: the same speed, risk and decisions under uncertainty — but here they can be lived through, understood and trained.

radar.word: Rapid decisions under speed and risk
Analysis of reactions and behavioral patterns
Rise of personal and managerial potential

format.title: Two parts of one intensive
format.intro: Learning through new experience: first — laps on a professional track, then — a debrief of conscious and unconscious reactions and work on leadership competencies.

parts.title: Racing laps and reaction debrief
parts.desc: Participation in laps on a professional track followed by an analysis of conscious and unconscious reactions.
bullets: Experience of fast decision-making under stress
Risk management and real-time situation assessment skills
Understanding your reactions and behavioral patterns in extreme conditions
Awareness of personal limits and growth potential
Team interaction practice in an unconventional setting

parts.title: Conscious self-management as a leader
parts.desc: A session on the conscious management of personal and professional skills, talents and energy.
bullets: Deep understanding of strengths and growth areas as a leader
Tools to boost personal and professional effectiveness
Strategies for managing energy and resourceful states
Conscious leadership and emotional intelligence skills
An action plan to develop key management competencies

modules.title: 6 management modules at Executive level
modules.intro: Each module lasts 3–4 days, followed by support and mentoring (chat-bot, expert guidance). Completing all modules earns a state-accredited diploma.

list.title: Unlocking management potential
list.desc: Race track training (partner Kamensky Racing School) and a session on conscious management of the leader's personal and professional effectiveness.

list.title: Management business modeling
list.desc: Building the leader's business model and a new company business model. Anti-crisis transformations for sustainable growth.

list.title: Artificial intelligence in management
list.desc: Practical adoption of AI in making and validating management decisions.

list.title: Automation and analytics
list.desc: Building an analytics system and systematic management of business processes.

list.title: Product management
list.desc: Creating and improving products, enriching customer experience, growth points, hypothesis testing, CJM, product process management.

list.title: Your own management project
list.desc: Repackaging your own product and business. Project defense, option for a double diploma.

audience.title: For those who make strategic decisions
audience.intro: The program is built for leaders responsible for the growth and future of the business.

list.title: Top management
list.desc: Leaders responsible for strategic decisions and their implementation.

list.title: Business owners
list.desc: Goals: business growth, finding new opportunities and markets.

list.title: Owners' advisors
list.desc: Finding and adopting innovation, operational efficiency, anti-crisis work.

list.title: Development directors
list.desc: Designing, approving and implementing strategic decisions.

speaker.name: Yulia Gordeeva
speaker.role: International consultant, creative visionary behind RADAR RACES
bio: 2010–2022 Head of international corporate training programs, IBS Plekhanov
2022–present Head of consulting and training practices for mid-size and large businesses
In 2025–2026 personally delivered over 250 hours of corporate trainings and strategic sessions for executives
Speaker and director of MBA programs
Expert speaker at business development venues of the Moscow Government: MBM, CDP, Innovation Agency
speaker.mission: Our goal is to pass on our superpowers — teaching you to see the business situation in 3D: from the model, through the leadership team, decision economics and the human complexity of change, to a sustainable management system.

gallery.title: Where decisions are born
gallery.subtitle: Professional track, pit lane and the team in action.

pricing.title: RADAR RACES — an investment in management growth
pricing.intro: Organization of any format includes the off-site event, two experts, post-module support, contracts and certificates.
pricing.note: The exact cost depends on the format, group composition and location. Leave a request — we'll tailor it to you.
